title: Polish-Style Pork and Dumplings
description: A hearty Italian-inspired dish featuring pork and pillowy dumplings. This comforting meal is perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add the pork shoulder and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
3. Remove the pork from the pot and set aside.
4. Add the polish sausage to the pot and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
6. Add the caraway seeds and cook for 1 minute.
7. Add the tomato sauce to the pot and stir to combine.
8. Return the pork to the pot and bring the sauce to a simmer.
9. Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the pork is tender, about 2 hours.
10. Add the dumplings to the pot and cook, covered, until they are cooked through, about 10-15 minutes.
11. Season the sauce with salt and black pepper to taste.
